key_evidence: UN Human Rights Chief Türk visited South Korea May 2026 — met with business leaders on AI governance and human rights (positive)
New AI Framework Act took effect January 22, 2026 (positive governance signal)
President Lee Jae-myung pledged to expand Ministry of Gender Equality (positive)
Supreme Court overturned acquittal of soldier under Military Criminal Act for consensual same-sex acts on base (negative LGBT rights)
Net direction: positive AI/gender signals offset by military justice LGBT regression — confirmation, not movement
